data.content: Implementation complete. All 22 target lib files refactored: zero max-lines, max-lines-per-function, and max-len ESLint warnings. Files split into ~50 smaller modules with re-exports preserving API compatibility. terminal-manager.ts (1717 lines) split into 12 files, doctor.ts (1129 lines) into 4, orchestration-manager.ts (1042 lines) into 6, knots-backend.ts (1157 lines) into 6, settings.ts (953 lines) into 5, bd.ts (853 lines) into 4, workflows.ts (761 lines) into 3. All quality gates pass: lint clean, tsc clean, 2239 tests pass, build succeeds. Merged to main and pushed.
